name: jacquardlabs-marketplace
description: Jacquard Labs skill plugins for Claude Code — quality gates, reviews, study tools, voice workflows, and more.

plugins.name: gg
plugins.description: Goals, guidelines, and gates — inner-loop verification for Claude Code. Contracts at every handoff: spec, decompose, build, gates, evidence.

plugins.name: jaqal
plugins.description: Jaqal — quality loom for Claude Code. Periodic health reviews, quality gates, design system extraction, and pre-deploy audits.

plugins.name: viva
plugins.description: Section-by-section markdown review for Claude Code. Claude presents its work, you drill every section, Claude defends and revises — the document only passes when it all holds up.

plugins.name: study-skills
plugins.description: Study workflow for Claude Code — 8 composable skills: flashcard decks, paper reader, concept checks, connection mapper, practice quizzes, and more.

plugins.name: voice-suite
plugins.description: Voice workflows for Claude Code — 7 skills that mine your writing for a voice profile, then generate docs, emails, chat messages, and rewrites in your voice.

plugins.name: dustjacket
plugins.description: Restyle, generate, and drift-check READMEs in their repo type's house style and a chosen voice — without fabricating anything.
